commodities.description: Natural gas futures rallied beyond the $3.00/MMBtu level on Tuesday, bolstered by threats to global supply amid the potential for a long and wide war in the Middle East.

commodities.title: LNG Markets Face Extreme Volatility as Middle East War Intensifies, Supply Disruptions Indefinite
commodities.description: An intensifying war in the Middle East wreaked havoc in energy markets Tuesday, with natural gas bearing the worst of it, but analysts predicted supply disruptions could be short-lived despite American and Israeli claims that their attacks against Iran could last weeks or longer.
